faqs.question: Give me an overview of the Next-Gen ERP & Bookkeeping service.
faqs.answer: MeandRobo provides an all-in-one AI-powered ERP tailored for Qatari SMEs. It unifies bookkeeping, invoicing, inventory tracking, and financial forecasting. Implementation typically takes 2-4 weeks. We offer subscription plans and handle full Dhareeba compliance.

faqs.question: What is the MeandRobo Next-Gen ERP?
faqs.answer: Our ERP system is tailored for Qatari SMEs. It provides an all-in-one dashboard to track net worth, automate bookkeeping, generate AI-driven financial insights, manage operations, and connect to Qatar's Dhareeba portal.

faqs.question: How long does it take to deploy the ERP system?
faqs.answer: Deploying the core Next-Gen ERP framework typically takes 2-4 weeks. If extensive custom integrations are required, it may take slightly longer. We map out your specific timeline during the consultation.

faqs.question: How much does the ERP and bookkeeping solution cost?
faqs.answer: Our pricing depends on your business size and custom modules. We offer subscription-based plans alongside a one-time setup fee for implementation. Please book a free consultation for an exact quote.
